programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Trapline Trouble

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Protect and Preserve
programme.desc: With just seven days to spare, Marty and Matt are determined to build a family the ultimate livestock fort against a pack of unruly coyotes. In the Ozarks, the family joins forces to help a sickly couple living in grave conditions.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Homecoming
programme.desc: The families prepare for the long, cold winter ahead. Heimo builds a brand-new cabin, while the Lewises work to restore their first cabin in the bush. As trapping season approaches, the Seldens try to stock up on moose meat.

programme.desc: As The Last Alaskans settle in to their fall routines in preparation for winter's trapping season, several visitors make their way out to the cabins. Heimo and Edna roll out the red carpet for their youngest daughter Krinn and new grandson, Colby.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Dragged Below
programme.desc: Catherine Dwinnell is hiking in Alaska when she is struck from behind and attacked by a 1,000-pound moose.

programme.title: I Was Prey: 20-Foot Terror
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip. Hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life. And, a couple celebrating their wedding anniversary are attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Hope and Prayer
programme.desc: A woman's vacation in Cancun, Mexico is cut short when she is attacked by a shark close to shore. In Tennessee, a firefighter and his family are hiking in the woods when he is bitten by a timber rattlesnake.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mountain Mayhem
programme.desc: Professional climber Greg Boswell is high up an ice-covered Canadian mountain in the middle of the night when he is charged by a grizzly bear. Also, in upstate New York, a retired nurse is attacked by a rabid coyote.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: Allena Hansen is working on her ranch in the California desert with her two rescue dogs when she is attacked by a black bear. And in Cancun, Mexico, Jonathan Schoeneman is spearfishing with his best friend when he comes face to face with a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Night Terror
programme.desc: On family trip to the Canadian wilderness, 12-year-old Zac Delventhal is dragged from his sleeping bag by a hungry wolf. While swimming in the Pacific Ocean, Maria Korcsmaros is attacked by a Great White shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: On a family trip to Pattaya, Thailand, Helen Costigan is attending an elephant show when one of the massive beasts turns deadly. Golf ball recovery specialist Scott Lahodik is diving in a Florida lake when he's attacked by a vicious alligator.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Safari Horror
programme.desc: Bob Legasa and his friend are hunting in Montana. What he thinks is a bluff charge from a grizzly bear is, in fact, a near-lethal attack. While canoeing in Zimbabwe, Kristen Yaldor is thrown into the water and finds herself in the jaws of a hippopotamus.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mauled in the Mountains
programme.desc: Louie van Grootel is working in the Canadian wilderness when he's attacked by a massive grizzly bear. In Colorado, Travis Kauffman is trail-running and comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Two's Company, Three is Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singleton's life appears picture perfect. Little does everyone know Linda is engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair comes to light, her 'perfect' life comes to an untimely end.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Serenade of a Stalker
programme.desc: 33 year old Nikki is building a karaoke business with her husband, Ben. But one night, a customer with an obsession for Nikki ends not only the dream but shatters her entire life with an act of extreme and unprovoked violence.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: SOS SMS
programme.desc: Hardworking nurse Tara opens a chilling text from a nameless sender - someone who knows her and means her harm.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bad To The Bone
programme.desc: These women are all 'bad to the bone,' so it's only a matter of time before they turn deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Trash to Treasure
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters count down their Top 10 Custom pieces of 'Trash" they've turned to "Treasure' as chosen by their fans.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: With an upcoming move fast approaching, a couple with three boys needs to put their home on the market as soon as possible. Their sloped yard and aging features aren't helping, so Chris and Sara stretch their bucket to get the value up.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Bright Lake House
programme.desc: Brock and Chase are giving a lake house some much needed updates. They get rid of the rubber flooring, carpet and dated accordion door. Brock creates a one of a kind artwork, made of barnwood. He adds sliding barn doors to give the home some rustic charm.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Cozy Traditional Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform a lackluster family cabin by giving it a beautiful open floor plan. The living room, dining room and kitchen come alive when the brothers add a center island with handmade wooden stools and ceiling beams to look like timber.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Retro To Rustic
programme.desc: Brock and Chase gut a lakeside retro guesthouse and give it a floor-to-ceiling rustic overhaul. They replace laminate flooring with wood, make a custom live-edge kitchen island and add a custom door frame to the main room.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Lakeside Scenic Porch Redo
programme.desc: Chase and Brock transform an uninviting, rarely used porch into a warm and rustic family gathering space. They add reclaimed barn wood to the ceiling, rough-sawn hardwood flooring and a huge sliding door looking toward the lake.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Rustic on the River
programme.desc: Brock and Chase tackle an old river cabin and transform the living space with timber beams, wood floors and a custom entertainment center. Then, a wood slat wall defines the space and is accented by a walnut kitchen island with hand wrought metal legs.

programme.title: Rustic Renovation: Nisswa Cabin
programme.desc: When a family's inherited 60-year-old lakeside cabin needs updating and more room for gatherings, the brothers blow out the back wall to take over the huge porch.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Good Eats: Down and Out in Paradise
programme.desc: A freak fishing accident leaves chef Alton Brown all washed up on a deserted tropical island. Armed with little more than a pocket knife and a will to survive, Alton gets by on coconuts, pineapples, mangos, papayas and one very feisty pig.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Bar: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this cocktail show from 2006 with a new martini, a new mint julep and perfectly clear ice cubes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kansas City
programme.desc: Andrew visits Kansas City, where he discovers a swirled Croatian dessert bread and a locally-made marshmallow chocolate candy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew discovers Seattle's iconic foods including Dungeness crab and teriyaki.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: America's cheesiest dishes just got even cheesier and Food Obsessed is here to find them! We're piling our plates high with mounds of ooey-gooey goodness from all around the country.

programme.title: Food Obsessed: Oodles of Noodles
programme.desc: Food Obsessed is exploring the endless options for noodles! We've prepared our appetites for everything from noodles swimming in marinara sauce to noodles fried to perfection.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry Eyes
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean chases rainbows to explain how our food's color can leave us tickled pink or feeling blue. Michael uncovers if cheddar cheese is really orange and if color can cause a taste bud blackout.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hole in One
programme.desc: Michael McKean shares the 'hole' story of everyone's favorite middle-missing baked goods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite foods went from paupers to princes. He looks at lobster's prison past, whether creme brulee was always the cream of the crop, and if champagne's fizz almost burst its bubble.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: Michael cranks up the heat on food myths, discovering who invented chili, if hot wings bond people closer together and if 'spicy' is just in our heads.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Power Couples
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite food combinations got hitched. Michael traces the origins of peanut butter and jelly to the trenches of World War II, sees how spaghetti and meatballs went from Italy to America.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Eat To Win
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes to bat finding out how our favorite stadium goods got tickets to the big leagues. Michael traces the football tailgate to a Civil War battlefield, shows how important the hot dog is to baseball's existence.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Once and Future Fish
programme.desc: Alton explores sustainable farm-raised trout as a solution to over-fishing.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics V: A Pound of Cake
programme.desc: Alton considers the pound cake to be an American classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Nation
programme.desc: Alton thinks outside the bottle by using beer and wine as key ingredients to prepare several tasty dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Proof Is in the Pudding
programme.desc: Alton Brown breaks into the liquor cabinet, not to concoct a drink but to examine the uses of alcohol in food preparation.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.desc: Explore how the challenges facing the women’s suffrage movement, including internal debates over radical tactics and the place of African American women in the movement, shaped the battle in the crucial period from 1906-1915.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Women's Work
programme.desc: Celebrate trailblazing women in a special hour spotlighting outstanding contributions from female athletes, artists, activists and more who left an indelible mark on the world around us through their thought-provoking objects and accomplishments.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Pelvic and Ribcage Mobility
programme.desc: Pelvic and ribcage mobility exercises take centre stage in a fun full-body workout.

programme.title: Curious George: Big, Bad Hundley/ George's Simple Siphon

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Tortuga Tune Up

programme.title: Hero Elementary: Toadal Confusion/ Hero Hideaway

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Busy Beaver/ The Night Waters

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Julia Child/ I Am Neil Armstrong
programme.desc: Julia Child encourages Xavier to try building his model airplane, even if it seems too complicated. Neil Armstrong inspires Yadina to break out of her comfort zone.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Beat the Beat/ Rhinoceros or Bust
programme.desc: The kids search for a happy kind of music called Benga./ Andy, with Luna as his guide, goes on a photo-safari.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Can't Ride Trolley/ Daniel Can't Get What He Wants
programme.desc: Mom explains to Daniel that he can't always get what he wants, but shows him a way to feel better.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Earth, Wind and Flyer/ Mini-Golf at the DSA
programme.desc: Jet is fascinated by the effects of wind on his saucer. He and the kids study how wind works, ending with Sean going on a wild saucer ride.

programme.title: Sesame Street: The Big Pretend Band
programme.desc: Bert learns how to pretend to play a saxophone so he can be in a pretend band.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: A Birthday Party for Kendra/ Norman Plans a Playdate
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Pinkalicious and her brother Peter.

programme.title: Masterpiece Mystery!: Grantchester

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Beecham House
programme.desc: John realizes he has no choice but to reveal the truth about his past and his baby's identity.

programme.desc: Find out why Marie Antoinette is often blamed for causing the French Revolution by saying 'let them eat cake' to her starving subjects. Lucy Worsley uncovers the myths and secrets that led the doomed queen to the guillotine.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Stop and Smell the Flowers/ Moms' Campout
programme.desc: Mom takes Tiny, Buddy, and Don on a super secret daytrip to Qianzhousaurus Pond.

programme.desc: The Cat in the Hat takes Nick and Sally to a mirror world.

programme.desc: A group of maids stumble across a woman who was tied up and nearly suffocated in her bed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Head

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Maternal Instincts
programme.desc: Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower while the SVU reports to a four-star hotel where a famous violinist was raped by her colleague. The investigation leads to the shocking return of Rollins' sister Kim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Depravity Standard
programme.desc: Benson seeks justice in the trial of child abductor Lewis Hodda, when the plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Collateral Damages
programme.desc: An undercover sting leads to the takedown of an online pedophile ring and the arrest of two high profile suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Manhattan Transfer
programme.desc: An investigation into the sexual exploitation of underage Catholic school girls leads to shocking charges against judges, legislators, DAs and members of the NYPD.

programme.title: Dirty John: The Betty Broderick Story: The Shillelagh
programme.desc: Having lost her sense of identity, Betty can only see her own pain and turn it outward.

programme.desc: An athlete is the victim of sexual assault, but her secret double life could ruin both the case against her attacker and her Olympic future. Meanwhile, Rollins reconnects with her sister, Kim, when she is released on parole.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rape Interrupted
programme.desc: A sergeant makes Benson choose between loyalty and duty when his son is accused of rape.

programme.title: Dirty John: The Betty Broderick Story: The Shillelagh
programme.desc: Having lost her sense of identity, Betty can only see her own pain and turn it outward.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Black and Blue
programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: The team travels to a Wisconsin gun show to take down a supplier who's manufacturing 'cop killer' machine guns. Before going undercover together, Burgess discovers that Upton is dating Ruzek.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Good Men
programme.desc: Using information from Chicago Fire's Cruz, Intelligence chases down the robbery crew using the lockbox key. Voight is under pressure to bring the crew to justice without tarnishing the reputation of a murdered firefighter who might have been involved.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Kill Me If You Can
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night. The crimes are seemingly unrelated but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Callen goes undercover as a patient in a mental health hospital to search for an NSA agent who disappeared while tracking an ISIS cell trying to cross the Mexican border.

programme.title: NCIS: Revenge
programme.desc: In retaliation for the murders of Eli David and Jackie Vance, the NCIS team feverishly searches for Bodnar despite orders from Homeland Security to relinquish the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: In the hopes of sparing a family further tragedy, the Secretary of the Navy calls on NCIS to help a sailor battling leukemia locate a bone marrow transplant. Also, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: NCIS: Spinning Wheel
programme.desc: After Ducky is attacked by a man claiming to have information about his half-brother who died decades ago, the team searches for the perpetrator. Also, with the holidays approaching, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Sister City

programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yes, We Have No Havanas
programme.desc: Blanche's latest boyfriend is a charming Cuban who sweeps her off her feet, but she's not the only one when Blanche discovers he's been dating Sophia behind her back.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Days and Nights of Sophia Petrillo
programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Blanche is determined to sleep with the one man who has refused her once in the past. Meanwhile, Rose claims to have seen a UFO and gets the Air Force involved.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yokel Hero
programme.desc: Rose vies for St. Olaf's award for the Woman of the Year.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bang the Drum, Stanley
programme.desc: Stan takes Dorothy and Sophia to a ballgame and asks them for a loan.

programme.title: Frasier: Rivals
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles become rivals when they are both smitten with the same woman.

programme.title: Frasier: A Tsar Is Born
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are stunned when Martin appears on 'The Antiques Roadshow' TV program.

programme.title: Frasier: The Late Dr. Crane
programme.desc: A man posing as Frasier drops dead and the mix-up allows Frasier to read his obituary.

programme.title: Frasier: The Apparent Trap
programme.desc: Frasier reluctantly invites Lilith to eat dinner with his fellow Cranes for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Frasier: Back Talk
programme.desc: Daphne overhears when Frasier takes some advice and confesses his suppressed anxieties.

programme.title: Frasier: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Daphne considers the implications of surprising information and Frasier plans a party.

programme.title: Frasier: RDWRER
programme.desc: Frasier recalls his millennial New Year's Eve as he, Niles and Martin travel to Idaho.

programme.title: Frasier: They're Playing Our Song
programme.desc: Frasier conjures up a theme song for his radio show in his typical overblown fashion.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Little Ricky Learns to Play the Drums
programme.desc: Lucy tries to settle her son's future career by seeing what toys he likes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Meets Orson Welles
programme.desc: Ricky fears disaster when Orson Welles asks Lucy to assist him with his magic act.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Little Ricky Gets Stage Fright
programme.desc: Stage fright hits Little Ricky before his debut as a drummer in a children's orchestra.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Visitor From Italy
programme.desc: Lucy tries to reunite a Venetian gondolier with his brother who lives in America.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: Sophia refuses to attend an old friend's funeral because her husband Max will be there.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: When the newlyweds return from their honeymoon, they are anxious to find their own place.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brother, Can You Spare That Jacket
programme.desc: A chase ensues after Sophia gives away a jacket with a winning lottery ticket in it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Blanche's brother, Clayton, comes to Miami for a visit, and Blanche goes all out fixing him up on blind dates. However, Rose learns the truth: Clayton is gay and is afraid to tell Blanche the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan Takes a Wife
programme.desc: Dorothy has second thoughts about Stan when he stands by her after Sophia falls ill.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Auction
programme.desc: The ladies plan to spend all of their savings to buy a dying artist's painting.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Debbie Matenopoulos and guest co-host Ali Fedotowsky-Manno welcome TV personality Brooke Burke. Chef Ed Brik prepares an Italian panzanella salad.

programme.title: Movie: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love.

programme.title: Movie: Paris, Wine and Romance
programme.desc: A winery owner travels to Paris for a major wine competition. She hopes her latest vintage will bring her numerous awards and accolades so she can make her father proud. While at the competition, she meets a man and starts a Parisian romance.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: A couple continue on their journey to see the vineyard succeed. While things have been challenging at times, the pair are united in their passion to see the business succeed. Looking toward the future, a wedding might be their next big investment.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: Goth Kids 3: Dawn of the Posers
programme.desc: The Goth kids are being sent away to a camp for troubled children.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping

programme.title: South Park: Gluten Free Ebola

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: The Snuke
programme.desc: When a new Muslim student joins the class, Cartman immediately suspects him of being a terrorist. Plus, the town is visited by Hillary Clinton.

programme.title: The Closer: Necessary Evil

programme.title: The Closer: You Have the Right to Remain Jolly
programme.desc: The holiday cheer is interrupted when Santa's entrance into a Christmas Village via a zip line goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sailor Man
programme.desc: Shortly after sailors invade the streets of Boston for Fleet Week a young girl is found dead. Frost's father, a Navy Admiral, comes to town, causing tension with his son. Maura goes on a date with Angela's mechanic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Brown Eyed Girl
programme.desc: When the daughter of a police officer is kidnapped, Jane and the team race to find her, fearing the abduction is connected to another case where a young girl turned up dead only hours earlier.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Roy/ Maness
programme.desc: A clean-freak mother who controls her family with iron fists changes lives with a construction worker mom whose family enjoys burping contests and partying.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Bimonte/ Hubbard
programme.desc: A manicured mom, who has never cooked a meal and runs a loud out-of-control household, swaps lives with a health-conscious mom who keeps her family on a tightly controlled schedule.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Kraut/ Hardin
programme.desc: A glitz and glamour-loving mother who believes too much is never enough swaps places with a devoutly religious country mother of eight who believes in the simple life.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Schachtner/ Martincak
programme.desc: An ultra-feminine modelling agency executive, who brings her little girls to her star-studded events, trades places with a traditional country woman who loves bear hunting, ice fishing and wrestling with her husband and children.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Revenge Killing
programme.desc: In 1987, a group of teens, hell-bent on revenge, killed local businessman John Hill who had raped their friend Jennifer. 30 years later, Chris Cuomo speaks to Lisa Harris, the only member of the group who was sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Harm's Way
programme.desc: Facing a 500-mile wide Siberian storm, Josh takes a big risk to keep the Cornelia Marie crew safe. Junior loses control of his rudders putting his boat at the mercy of heavy seas. Jake's greenhorn problems get a lot worse when one clogs the toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Chase Boat Rescue
programme.desc: Listing heavily and taking on water, Junior calls on chase boat rescue for the first time in series history. Wild Bill sends Nick 20 feet off the deck in spite of his fear of heights. Josh and Casey hit a massive wave that knocks out greenhorn Maria.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Dutch Harbor Double Cross
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: Cornelia Marie skippers Josh and Casey navigate a tenuous partnership at the Russian line. There's hell to pay on the Summer Bay when Bill's backup block goes missing. Sig puts a heavy Northwestern in Mandy's hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Welcome to Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: These people tackle dirt, grime and some other not-so-nice substances; visit a cave where bat guano is collected for some of the best fertilizer in the world, and discover the dirty secret behind major league baseballs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Horse Tester
programme.desc: Mike travels to Kentucky Equine Research Facility to assist with testing athletic horses. His duties include helping with blood testing during a fitness test and checking pH levels in fresh poo.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill
programme.desc: While coping with a fractured relationship with his son, Wild Bill rushes to convert his two million dollar investment into a commercial crabber before the season begins.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bomb Cyclone
programme.desc: The Wizard catches fire in a violent storm known as a bomb cyclone. Josh and Casey attempt to fish in 30-foot seas, while two rogue waves slam the Southern Wind. Wild Bill grinds his crew 72 straight hours bringing himself to the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Welcome to Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: These people tackle dirt, grime and some other not-so-nice substances; visit a cave where bat guano is collected for some of the best fertilizer in the world, and discover the dirty secret behind major league baseballs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bologna Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Pennsylvania and tries his hand at making bologna and then goes to Alaska to repair a very special toilet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of Jake Anderson
programme.desc: Against all odds, Jake Anderson fought his way back from addiction to become a captain. Now he has just two weeks to pull off another miracle, reviving his battered boat in shipyard.

programme.title: Nostradamus Decoded
programme.desc: Take a look at the mystery of Nostradamus as they tackle the fascinating questions and expose the truth about the world's greatest prognosticator and offer insight into human nature.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore

programme.desc: A young operator faces a toxic mess when a tanker bursts open. Gary reacts fast when he spots a dangerous mistake on the road. A rookie takes the controls for his first heavy job.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: There's Always Fear
programme.desc: Steve’s crew battles a fiery wreck in the heart of Toronto. A newly-promoted rotator operator gest his first big test when freezing rain ices up the highway around London.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Sand Tsunami

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Raining Spiders
programme.desc: Lightning creates a storm of spiders, freaky weather turns a beach into a winter wonderland, a "weather-bomb" floods a town with eels, plus toxic algae and "Manhattan Henge" on this episode of Strangest Weather on Earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Weather Mystery and Mayhem
programme.desc: From the top of a black volcano, to the bottom of a rainbow river, this episode explores the colourful mystery of the weather. From winds that can blow over a train, to hail that can flood a city, this is weather that is unbelieve.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Extreme Weather Erupts

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Trapped By Tornadoes
programme.desc: A storm chaser tracks the trail of a terrifying tornado as the twister traps teachers and pupils at a school in Indiana, USA. Wildfires rip across the moors in the north of England.

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Golden State Nightmare

programme.desc: Mildred Muhammad, ex-wife of infamous 'DC Sniper' John Allen Muhammad, reveals how the man she loves disintegrated into a monster who threatens to kill her, including an interview from prison with Melissa Moore, Muhammad's teenage accomplice.

programme.title: The Killing Season: Whoever Fears Monsters
programme.desc: Joshua Zeman and Rachel Mills investigate the serial killer case involving 10 dead sex workers discovered on Long Island. They consult cyber-sleuths, journalists and victims’ families and uncover connections that suggest Long Island is just the beginning.

programme.title: The Killing Season: The Most Dangerous Game
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel examine a series of mysterious torso killings ascribed to the 'Butcher of Manorville' that are now linked to the Long Island Serial Killer case. They locate and interview the former pimp of one of the victims.

programme.title: The Killing Season: Danse Macabre
programme.desc: Shannan Gilbert’s funeral, family lawyer John Ray presents testimony that could implicate a local doctor. When Josh and Rachel travel to the secluded Oak Beach community, one family is willing to speak out.

programme.title: The Killing Season: A Darkness on the Edge of Town
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel, continue their search for the Eastbound Strangler in Atlantic City. They revisit the motel where the bodies were dumped and tour the site with a man who at the time was the police's person of interest.

programme.title: The Killing Season: Different Seasons
programme.desc: Josh and Rachel are in Florida looking into the case of the Daytona Beach Serial Killer. Josh and Rachel discover an even greater horror that extends far beyond the beaches of Daytona and spreads through American highways.

programme.title: The Killing Season: A Killer on the Road
programme.desc: After a private investigator's alarming revelation that there exists long haul truckers moonlighting as serial killers terrorizing America's interstate system, Josh and Rachel begin a cross-country journey to research these killers on wheels.

programme.title: The Killing Season: Wasteland
programme.desc: Rachel and Josh are frustrated by the current systems used to detect serial killers so they head to New Mexico to experience just how bad things have become. However, the Albuquerque police quickly shut them down.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: After a young woman has a deadly premonition, the New Orleans homicide team discovers her killer may have killed before.

programme.title: The First 48: Best Laid Plans/ Burned Alive
programme.desc: In Harris County, a young woman set on fire clings to life as deputies race to find who left her for dead. In Cleveland, when a teenager is shot down in the street, detectives discover his best friends may have something to do with the murder.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Do or Die
programme.desc: Mary holds a final town meeting before heading out on tour, and the garage is converted into a Crap Shack so tird production continues while she's gone.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.desc: The family heads to Bali for a relaxing vacation, but tensions flare when Kourtney accuses Khloe of complaining too much. Scott tries to find buried treasure and enlists the help of his kids. In LA, Kendall and Kylie help their mom care for MJ.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette
programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery

programme.title: Botched: Supa Fupa
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynecologist did her tummy tuck, Paul performs a reconstructive rhinoplasty on a woman who's been teased about her nose since childhood, and a Brazilian human seeks the doctors' help for botched chest implants.

programme.title: Botched: Double D-isaster
programme.desc: Paul helps a female impersonator who isn't comfortable walking the streets without makeup. A woman with 'sideshow boobs' goes under the knife to help her marriage, and the doctors extract silicone star implants from a former body-modification enthusiast.

programme.title: Botched: Foreign Bodies
programme.desc: Rajee is back and the doctors attempt to fix her cement-filled face. Terry performs surgery on a woman whose nipples are too high, and an 'out-of-this-world' patient wants to look like an alien.

programme.desc: The chefs must make coffee click with the basket ingredients. In round two the chefs are surprised by sweetbreads and a brightly-colored sugary snack must be balanced with black molasses in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: True Grits

programme.title: Chopped: Time and Turmoil

programme.title: Chopped: Jarring Jars

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Molly's Baby Shower
programme.desc: It's time for Molly Yeh's baby shower and there's quite a crowd to feed. Molly keeps it simple-but-delicious with her potato, sausage and broccoli frittata and herby salad with burrata.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Generational Goodies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Ladies Who Brunch
programme.desc: Molly shares her favourite meal of the day with some of her favourite friends from Grand Fords, N.D. She's making them a brunch feast that includes a mini kale shakshuka, a sweet potato and bacon hash and her make ahead baked challah French toast.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Potluck
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are going to a potluck dinner, and Molly's bringing some of her favourite Midwestern dishes with a twist, like her beautiful 8-layer salad loaded with sweet squash and farro.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Engagement Dinner
programme.desc: Ree and her sister in law are throwing and engagement party for their friend. They have prepared delicious appetizers such as brie stuffed mushrooms, bacon-wrapped shrimp with chilli butter and an amazing main course or prime rib.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Special Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's daughter Paige is spending the day watching some of the younger kids, so Ree packs them some fun treats for a late-afternoon picnic. She makes Animal Crackers, Crunchy Cereal Chicken Fingers, Cucumber Finger Sandwiches.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: B-Man and Me
programme.desc: Ree's spending quality time with her son, Bryce, and making him beef fajita nachos for dinner. The next day, she's getting ahead with a delicious slow cooker white chicken chili for the family's dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: FAQ
programme.desc: Q and A answers starring a slow cooker Mexican soup and a healthy kale salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 7
programme.desc: Ree cooks for the 4th of July with store-bought shortcuts and lots of fun with her family crew. She makes party-ready chipotle Caesar salad with grilled salmon, a fabulous cheesy asparagus tart and easy corn dip that's a real crowd pleaser.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Never Enough Puff
programme.desc: Ree shares her top five favorite things to do with puffed pastry, her secret weapon for entertaining made easy! First, cheese straws and sausage parmesan palmiers are a duo of divine quick and easy canapes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Salute to Firefighters
programme.desc: Four firefighters are heating up the market with a chance to smoke the competition and win up to $20,000. First, the chefs must make a big dinner, but with a 'small' catch. Next, the red lights are flashing as Guy asks the chefs to make a healthy lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winning Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings back the winning teams of previous competitions for another battle of team supremacy. First, he has them shop without carts for their surf and turf ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Game Day Rush
programme.desc: It's Closing Time, and the chefs have just two minutes to shop for their game day feast ingredients. Then, in a Single Aisle Showdown, the chefs are tasked to make their best dish using only the produce and condiments aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Star Academy Face-Off
programme.desc: Curtis Stone and Richard Blais are special guest mentors for four cooks from All-Star Academy who have to get through Guy's list of wacky items. They have to complete a fine dining dinner, bowl for strikes and Guy has a special challenge at the end.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Root of All Fears

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari

programme.title: Raven's Home: Disorder in the Court

programme.title: Raven's Home: Girls Just Want to Have Phones
programme.desc: Nia and Tess challenge Raven and Chelsea to see who can go without technology the longest. Meanwhile, Booker tries to impress a new girl in the building.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Upcycle-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Muffler-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv is filming the 'sequel' to the muffler commercial she did when she was six. Meanwhile, Maddie is feeling nervous about her knee as she prepares for her first game back.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Dancers and Ditzes

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Comebacks and Crystal Balls

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lava at First Sight
programme.desc: When Ava's brother visits Camp Kikiwaka Lou develops a big crush on him.

programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.
