programme.desc: In 1959, nine students died mysteriously while hiking and the Yeti is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bible's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Investigations into the greatest figures of the Bible could reveal fresh evidence behind millennia-old mysteries, and using the latest archaeological methods, experts uncover shocking truths behind these icons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for MH370
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade uses recent discoveries and cutting-edge technology to investigate the whereabouts of flight MH370, and what he uncovers points to an overlooked stretch of water.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for MH370
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade uses recent discoveries and cutting-edge technology to investigate the whereabouts of flight MH370, and what he uncovers points to an overlooked stretch of water.

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Amazon: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the mystery of what happened to the ancient superpower that once thrived in the Amazon jungles, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts are hot on the trail of the perpetrators that caused this civilization to fall.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty is one of the most iconic sights in the world, yet there are still secrets to be found and mysteries to be solved. Historians, archaeologists and engineers embark on a quest to unravel the inspiration behind her curious design.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech helps experts explore The Empire State Building, one of the wonders of the modern world, like never before, revealing the secrets of its construction and the mysteries hidden deep in its foundation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Twin Towers: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: New evidence recovered from the site of the World Trade Center's Twin Towers reveals answers to the greatest mysteries of these modern marvels, and using cutting-edge science and technology, experts investigate the science behind why they collapsed.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Skyscraper vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: A skyscraper sinking into the earth, the world's strongest wall in crisis, and a deadly bridge are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: A skyscraper causing hellish heat in downtown Dallas, a swarm of sinkholes, and a landmark with a fatal secret.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hellfire USA
programme.desc: A fire in an American town burning since 1962, a massive flood that threatens Chicago's iconic skyscrapers, and a town swallowed by the sea are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Ghost Town From Hell
programme.desc: A detonated building mysteriously refuses to fall, an American ghost town with a deadly legacy, and wind turbines on the brink of disaster are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Devil's Dam
programme.desc: When a dam breaks during routine maintenance, engineers fear a catastrophic flood. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how a simple miscalculation could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Two can keep a secret, if one of them is dead. These Deadly Women think they've committed the perfect murders.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Web of Lies: In Dark Corners
programme.desc: Vulnerable mother of five Laura Simonson seeks comfort in the online world of sexual bondage. Lured by a mysterious user named 'Mr. Handcuffs,' Laura doesn't know that she's walking straight into his twisted trap.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Who Shot Buckii?
programme.desc: It's the middle of the night when Delvin 'Buckii' Meadows is shot and killed in his neighbor's yard. As police investigate, it's not until witnesses come forward with information that detectives realize they may be the key to finding Delvin's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Who Shot Buckii?
programme.desc: It's the middle of the night when Delvin 'Buckii' Meadows is shot and killed in his neighbor's yard. As police investigate, it's not until witnesses come forward with information that detectives realize they may be the key to finding Delvin's killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: My Dearest Diary
programme.desc: When Angela and Ashley Hyke go missing one hot summer night and candles are found burning in their home, those close to them know that something is horribly wrong. The key to solving the mystery may lie in Angela's cryptic diary.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Nestled halfway between Bangor and the Canadian border, Webster Plantation has a population of less than 70 people. When two of its residents, Michael and Valerie Miller are found brutally murdered in their home, fear overwhelms everyone in town.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Left Alone
programme.desc: In 1986, 13 year-old Mollie Pittman is attacked and murdered in the Orlando home of family friends. With no sign of a break-in, investigators wonder, did Mollie know her killer? Seventeen years of dogged investigation reveal the terrifying truth.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Forest
programme.desc: In 1985, a popular high school girl is found murdered in the Angeles National Forest. Investigators run through a network of a classmates, rivals, and troublemakers to find her killer. Years later, a break in the cases exposes the shocking truth.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder on Miguel Lane
programme.desc: In 1985, the homicide of three Arlington, Texas teens shocked the community.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: In April, 2004, the dismembered body of a chef was found in trash bags along a highway. His bones gave investigators the twisted answer to his bloody demise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis' life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs looking for clues but the biggest revelation comes from the poison itself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins. Then... a mother of five is shot in the head and it's up to Kenda to uncover the truth behind her untimely death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the 'victim' could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun. The key to the case lies in the deal they were discussing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower
programme.desc: A showcase of the heaviest hitting military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Long Range Strikers
programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: When it comes to military hardware, tough is what keeps you alive. Take a look at the toughest military hardware on the planet.

programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Squatters and Scorpions
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a Palm Springs property sight unseen, but once they get inside they see that it's been trashed by squatters and inhabited by scorpions. The only way to make a profit is to gut the home, adding extra dollars to their budget.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: This Mold House
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a house that's stuck in the past, but they have high hopes of bringing it into the future. Renovating outdated architecture is part of the job, but it's the unexpected disasters that make or break a flip.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: It Takes a Villa
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey discover unlisted their Tuscan villa is missing a few ingredients. The kitchen has mysteriously been gutted, the in-ground pool is plagued with pests and the landscaping has overgrown its welcome.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Bigger, Better, Boulder
programme.desc: A leaky pipe and rotting roof quickly add dollars to Eric and Lindsey's budget, and the flip must go on. The costs quickly climb as they try to pinch every penny, but going big on design might be the only way to squeeze a profit out of this flip.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Ain't Seen Nothing Yet
programme.desc: After hiring her neighbour to renovate her kitchen, Lali has nothing but a demo to show for the $11,000 she paid him.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1918 Dutch Colonial home in Upland, California for a woman moving back in with her mother. The family would like to see the house restored to its former glory. Brett quickly learns this house is a time capsule full of discoveries.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mediterranean Seafood Fests
programme.desc: Roger heads to Northern California for two spectacular wood-fired Mediterranean seafood feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: South American Grilling
programme.desc: Roger meets two chefs celebrating Argentina's Asado and Brazil's Churrasco in northern California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas BBQ
programme.desc: Roger visits two legendary BBQ joints in Texas where just the right amount of smoke and heat transforms the meat into delicious eats.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roasting and Ranching in Texas
programme.desc: Roger takes a trip to West Point, Texas to meet Tink Pinkard, an outdoor guide and all-around nice guy.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Minnesota's largest city, where he tries a legendary burger that's become a regional icon, noshes on a gigantic brunch meal served with its own food Ferris wheel and takes on a massive four-pound banh mi behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: California Dreamin and Southern Swagger
programme.desc: Lobster roll expert Sabin Lomac is searching for delicious seaside fare from all over the country. At the Old 27 Grill in Fairhope, Ala., he goes all in for the Holy Cow Burger with creamy au poivre sauce.

programme.title: Seaside Snacks and Shacks: Let The Good Times Roll
programme.desc: Lobster roll expert Sabin Lomac starts his hunt for delicious eats by the seaside in Traverse City, Mich., where Sparks BBQ is famous for a "sundae" with pulled pork as the ice cream, coleslaw as the topping and beef jerky as the cherry on top.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Homerun Barbecue
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in St. Louis looking for the best deals for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. First up to bat is a slider piled high with pulled pork and chorizo chili. For lunch under the arch, it's a jail cell pork belly BLT.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Topsy Turvy Tiffin Mystery/ Mystery at the Invention Fair
programme.desc: When Mikku and Chikku accidentally mix up the tiffin delivery, Mira helps set things right. At the Jalpur Invention Fair, an important piece of Dhruv's invention goes missing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Party Mountain / Woflies of the Pagoda
programme.desc: The PJ Masks are enticed by a fake An Yu to break all the rules, and have a party on Mystery Mountain. An Yu tries to domesticate the wild Wolfies!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Gekko and the Opposite Ray/ PJ Masks vs. Bad Guys United
programme.desc: Romeo's newest device turns Owlette and Catboy into villains! All the villains join forces to finally defeat the PJ Masks once and for all!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hot Dog Daze Afternoon/ Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: On Mickey's day off, he continues getting called back to help at the garage. The Happy Helpers look after Mrs. Sweetums' candy store and factory.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mouse vs. Machine/ Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: When Luna, goes on a mission and loses her memory as a result, Catboy and Gekko give up on her. The PJ Masks learn that the heart of being a hero is being a good friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Giant Adventure
programme.desc: When Willie the Giant gets a stomach ache, Mickey's buddy Goofy embarks on a fairytale quest to retrieve a magical elixir that will make his friend feel better. Along the way, Goofy encounters some enchanting characters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy-Bo-Peep
programme.desc: Daisy-Bo-Peep loses her 10 sheep and enlists Mickey and the gang to help find them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: Everyone sets out to find the End of the Rainbow.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Baby
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake has invented a time machine and Goofy is his first volunteer.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Chuggington: The Extra Mile/ Wilson's Broadcast Blues
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Fancy Dancin' Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ready, Get Pet ... Go PLUTO!/ Figaro's New Friend!
programme.desc: When pets are allowed to join their owners on a race, Pluto and Pete's dog Butch try to upstage each other. The Happy Helpers look after Pluto, and Figaro gets jealous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Ukulele Jam / Grandpa vs. Grandpa
programme.desc: While participating in a Ukulele Jam, Donald loses Mickey's special ukulele. The Happy Helpers are judges for a Hawaiian surfing contest and learn about a lifelong rivalry!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes
programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Fantastic Pet Force / Sea No Turtle
programme.desc: The puppies leap into action to assemble their own real-life team of puppy heroes. Bob takes the pugs on a conservation vacation where he volunteers to study sea turtles.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Search for Squibbles/ Factory Fabulous
programme.desc: Stuffy is distraught when Squibbles goes missing. When Doc brings home a Locker O’Lemurs, the other toys are dazzled by their acrobatic talents.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.desc: Kick can't get a wink of sleep when Wacky Jackie and Cousin Kyle throw him a celebration in honour of his latest stunt.

programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: D.C. Snipers

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Andrea Yates
programme.desc: In 2001, Andrea Yates drowned her five small children in the bathtub of their Houston home. Her bizarre explanation was that she did it to save her children from Satan.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Amanda Knox
programme.desc: In 2007, Amanda Knox, an American exchange student living in Italy, was arrested and tried for the murder of her roommate. The evidence was shockingly graphic, but the DNA was inconclusive. A look at the case and where things stand today.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Genghis Khan's Tomb
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Mongolia's 'forbidden zone' to find Genghis Khan's tomb.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Code To Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours the Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, he takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh joins the hunt for a $2000000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Gold Digging Josh
programme.desc: Josh breaks out the treasure maps as he virtually searches for buried fortunes and riches around the world with the help of magicians Penn and Teller, among others.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes inside a cutting-edge archaeological investigation that is unearthing brand-new discoveries about Noah's Ark. As experts get closer to finding its final resting place, they reveal the long-lost secrets of this famous vessel.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Stuck in the Muck
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head into the Everglades to take on the role of airboaters stuck in a sawgrass prairie marsh under the blazing Florida sun. They must seek shelter in a nearby swamp where water moccasin, python and alligators lay in wait.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Slash and Burn
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how lost hunters can survive in the harsh conditions of Tierra Del Fuego, just 500 miles from Antarctica. To demonstrate how to survive an extreme injury, Dave self-inflicts a laceration and uses black powder to cauterize the wound.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eating Dust
programme.desc: From the barren salt flats to the vast desert woodland, Dave and Cody battle the elements in the sun scorched desert of Baja, Mexico. With few supplies, they each demonstrate how to make use of an unlikely resource- urine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bitten
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how to survive the rugged jungle in Thailand using only the gear an ill-equipped ecotourist might carry for a day trek: a Thai jungle knife, steel wool, a sharpening stone, a damaged cell phone and a bag of tobacco.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Frozen Plains
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the scenario of two ranchers, stranded on the windy plains in the dead of winter. Their only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster. Armed with nothing but a machete, they show how to escape the bush without getting eaten alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Adrift
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the survival scenario of two castaways adrift at sea and show how to survive being stranded on a deserted jungle island in the South Pacific. This time, Dave goes barefoot.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kirsten's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 pounds, Kirsten is close to losing all her mobility. While she's trying to get control of her obesity she's also in danger of losing her troubled son.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Karina's Story
programme.desc: Unable to stand for more than a short period of time, Karina's weight has placed a burden on her parents and driven a wedge between her and her sister.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy Lyn's Story
programme.desc: After years of a tumultuous relationship with her husband, Tamy's eating addiction has caused her weight to balloon over 500-lbs. She has become a hermit after years of shame, and hopes to restart her life so she can better care for her son Zachary.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy and Karina
programme.desc: Tamy faces a tough choice when her husband wants her back but only if she moves away from Houston and Dr. Now's program. Karina's weight loss begins to slow, but she finds happiness dating a guy Dr. Now is surprised to see in his clinic again.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy Lyn's Story
programme.desc: After years of a tumultuous relationship with her husband, Tamy's eating addiction has caused her weight to balloon over 500-lbs. She has become a hermit after years of shame, and hopes to restart her life so she can better care for her son Zachary.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tamy and Karina
programme.desc: Tamy faces a tough choice when her husband wants her back but only if she moves away from Houston and Dr. Now's program. Karina's weight loss begins to slow, but she finds happiness dating a guy Dr. Now is surprised to see in his clinic again.

programme.title: Rattled: Broken Water, Broken Hearts
programme.desc: Surprise pregnancies turn 3 couples' lives upside down. Krystal & Jarrel argue over their baby's paternity until Krystal goes into labor. Aly & Josh uproot their lives to grow their family. Doug & Mars are still volatile even though their baby is now 2.

programme.title: Rattled: Return of the Quads
programme.desc: Jarrel won't talk custody with Krystal without a DNA test. Aly's allergic reaction during labor makes her high-risk pregnancy more dangerous. The quads are back and busting out of their house. Brooke, a pregnant wrestler, is terrified of giving birth.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We're Having SIX-tuplets
programme.desc: The Waldrops are a family from Alabama with three lively boys. Parents Courtney and Eric get the shock of their lives when Courtney becomes pregnant with sextuplets. They face a high-risk delivery and the stress of becoming parents of nine kids overnight.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: What to Expect When You're Expecting Six Babies
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to split her time between the babies and the older boys. Eric takes on more work to keep up with new expenses. The family attempts their first public outing with the sextuplets on Mother's Day and soon face one of their biggest fears.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Shelly
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Shelley has been penny-pinching in Mesa, Ariz. for over 20 years. But Shelley's biggest money-saving challenge is going to be throwing her daughter Ashley's wedding on a $1,000 budget.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Kate
programme.desc: Dumpster diver Kate takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper
programme.desc: Jamie's entire garden is made up solely of silk flowers. Now, she aims to replace her whole lawn with artificial grass, to eliminate her landscaping bill. Justin tries to land a job in sales, where he promises to save his employer tons of dough.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: After Separation
programme.desc: The separation of conjoined twins is among the rarest of medical procedures that many do not survive long enough to face. This is the story of three very different sets of conjoined twins and their lives after separation.

programme.title: Girls Who Don't Age
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of three girls who have stopped ageing. Frozen in time and destined to live their lives as toddlers, what is affecting these girls, how are they cheating time and could they help us unlock the secrets of the ageing process?

programme.title: 30 Inches Tall and Turning 18
programme.desc: Georgia Rankin is an average teenager at the height of an average two-year-old. Measuring 2 feet 7 inches tall, she's charismatic, and happy, despite suffering constant pain in her joints. We follow Georgia for a year as she seeks medical treatment.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bella Twins
programme.desc: Twin divas Nicole and Brianna stop by the set to show some of their backyard wrestling moves and how to make a perfect pain angel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get in touch with their softer sides in 'tough and tender', watch some baby thieves in 'tiny, sticky fingers', and experience a triple dose of pain in 'triple threats'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tory Lanez
programme.desc: Multi-talented recording artist Tory Lanez joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to talk about the idea of being TOO SWAVEY, people who are HARD TO LOVE, and what it's like living in MADHOUSES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Cesar Millan
programme.desc: The Dog Whisperer, Cesar Millan, joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to recognize some true alphas, listen to some dog whistles, and find their inner dog in "perreros."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXVII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about the pitfalls of giving ‘111 percent’, the discomfort that is ‘weird love’, and feeling like you're at ‘the wrong party’.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wale
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel hang out with Hip-Hop superstar Wale, meet a few women with 'no chill', see who's 'numb to the madness', and meet some 'fans of the district'.

programme.title: The Challenge: Crash into Me
programme.desc: One player's sloppy political maneuvering comes back to haunt them, while another takes a shocking gamble to save a friend. Competitors must fight for survival in the elimination game 'Hall Brawl', where two players with Red Skulls will be eliminated.

programme.title: Revenge Prank: The Prank with the Flash Drive
programme.desc: Pauly D helps artist Coca make his girlfriend Keisha believe they're being blackmailed. Keisha is led to believe their relationship but also their careers are on the line.

programme.title: Revenge Prank: The Prank with a Pig
programme.desc: Vinny helps Sunny get revenge on his brother Soko for putting a massive snake in his bed by tricking him into believing his precious sports car is being stolen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Becky Lynch

programme.desc: DNA evidence found on a murder victim leads to the arrest of Houston's notorious 'tourniquet killer;' after a young woman is found shot and burned in California, investigators spend years trying to pin the rap on the woman's boyfriend and his cousin.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killings on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A family torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that's haunted him since he was a child. When he breaks the case, he must race to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Sweethearts, Silenced
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts, and three other cold case murders, leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Cop Killer/ Evil Twin
programme.desc: A bandit who gunned down two police officers is taken into custody; a murderer has an identical twin.

programme.title: The First 48: Bad Reputation/ Deadly Party
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young mother of three is gunned down in front her home. In Broward County, Florida, a young man is shot at a birthday party, and detectives try to learn why a celebration turned deadly.

programme.title: The First 48: No Return/ Dangerous Game
programme.desc: In Miami, as a family settles in for the night, gunshots erupt in their front yard and a shocked mother discovers her son shot dead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Dips and Dunkers
programme.desc: Amy hosts a party to watch the big game in hopes of attracting a younger TV watching demographic. A special guest shows her how to prepare the perfect game day dip.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Dips and Dunkers

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Game Warden
programme.desc: Texas game wardens patrol the inland waterways and the Gulf of Mexico. A nuisance alligator gets too close for comfort. Illegal fish lead to multiple citations. A suburban squirrel hunter gets caught trespassing. Wardens race to free an injured deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Poacher Round Up
programme.desc: A poacher gets a surprise visit from Warden Johnson, while Wardens Eddins and Inman get a suspected poacher to confess. While patrolling deer camps, an injured pelican is rescued.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Search and Rescue Stakeout
programme.desc: A stakeout with potentially dangerous criminal activity is underway and a sudden onslaught from Mother Nature results in a slew of search and rescue missions.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: A Smartphone with video evidence of a crime leads to a poacher. Two drunken sledders run over a warden and are chased through the woods. Herring hunts down a man that he knows with arrest warrants. LaFlamme helps a herd of deer in distress.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Mayday Mayday
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens investigate a Jet Ski accident that sends an injured man to the hospital. The Wardens must track down a hunter shooting doves in a residential neighbourhood. On Lake Lewisville, Wardens deal with a partier who's had too much to drink.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Game Warden
programme.desc: Texas game wardens patrol the inland waterways and the Gulf of Mexico. A nuisance alligator gets too close for comfort. Illegal fish lead to multiple citations. A suburban squirrel hunter gets caught trespassing. Wardens race to free an injured deer.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Shaq Takes it to the Trees!
programme.desc: It's a slam dunk when Pete builds an all-star speakeasy for basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal. The ball is in Pete's court to design a decagonal structure with a soaring 25 ft high ceiling and extra wide stairs to accommodate Shaq and his size 22 shoes.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: A Treehouse Production
programme.desc: Pete has spread the treehouse bug to a long-time friend and show producer who's hanging up his TV hat to open a treehouse B&B. The classic A-frame structure will have all the amenities and a waterfall that pours from the wraparound deck to the pond below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: International: France
programme.desc: Pete travels through France with treehouse visionary, Alain Laurens. Winding through the magical countryside, Alain shows Pete his fantastical structures that implement ingenious engineering, reach dizzying heights and redefine what a treehouse can be.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Super Spy Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete heads to Alabama's Appalachia to build a super spy treehouse. There, he pulls out all the stops to make the client's espionage-themed dreams come true. We're talking gadgets, hidden passageways, secret rooms and more.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Lifted Lodge Treehouse
programme.desc: The NTS crew travels to an alpaca farm to build a lodge in the trees inspired by our National Parks. They create a structure to take in the mountain views with a 50 foot long cable bridge entrance and a deck devoted entirely to hammock lounging.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Never Too Old for a Treehouse
programme.desc: Dreams are coming to life in Oregon as Pete builds for an exceptional client named Marlene, who at 81-years-young is finally getting one of her greatest wishes fulfilled: a treehouse. Marlene's giddy with excitement for this new adventure.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Antonio Brown's Steel City Skybox
programme.desc: Pete makes a treehouse touchdown in Pittsburgh for Antonio Brown, wide receiver for the Steelers. The game plan is to build a luxury skybox with a two-storey window wall that overlooks a custom basketball court and football field.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Semper Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Pete answers the call of duty to build a treehouse in Pennsylvania that focuses on the children of Marines. Cargo netting off the deck provides an exciting way to enter, while even more nets inside form a bridge to access a private loft space.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Climb-in Drive-In
programme.desc: Pete tackles the first ever climb-in movie theater. Concessions are served to seating pods through a pulley system, and loungers elevate into the trees to give perfect views of the big screen. Pete travels to build a treehouse for monkeys at the LA Zoo.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hot Tub Rumpus Room
programme.desc: Pete's fun-loving friend, and forklift supplier, is the lucky recipient of a treehouse built strictly for good times. The team builds a dream of a treehouse complete with a wine bar, a loft and their first ever hot tub in the woods of Western Washington.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Carpe Diem

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess: When in Rome. . .

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess: Forget Me Not
programme.desc: Gabrielle goes to the Temple of Mnemosyne to forget her painful memories.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess: Tsunami
programme.desc: Xena, Gabrielle and Autolycus must escape from a ship submerged by a monstrous tidal wave.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess: Vanishing Act
programme.desc: Xena, Gabrielle, and Autolycus pull off a heist to retrieve the golden statue of Pax.

programme.title: Movie: Need for Speed
programme.desc: Two years after being framed and imprisoned for manslaughter, a blue-collar mechanic joins a cross-country car race in the hopes of exacting revenge. With a bounty placed on his car by the man who framed him, he must dodge the authorities at every turn.

programme.title: Movie: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
programme.desc: An elite military unit, known as G.I. Joe, tracks the movements and developments of an evil organization. When a weapon is developed that uses nanotechnology, the Joes have to get the weapons back before it is used on the world.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: With Neighbors This Good
programme.desc: A couple with an incredible community have a cramped house that has stopped working. They need help reconfiguring their tight kitchen, overstuffed dining room and dated living room.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Rescued Into a Forever Home
programme.desc: After having two kids, the major overhaul needed to create a couple's forever home hasn't happened. They call on Drew and Jonathan to make their living room, dining room and kitchen function for their needs before they adopt a second rescue puppy.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home - Unpacked: New Lives, New Home
programme.desc: A couple that took a step back from busy careers to focus on their kids dreams of a layout that works for their family. Drew and Jonathan open up their floor plan to create a kitchen and living room that match the family's needs.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Hot Mess to Less Stress
programme.desc: A couple that moved frequently their whole lives made it a habit to never fully unpack at each new home so when they needed an item they couldn't find, they just bought a new one. As a result, they've amassed a lot of things they don't need.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hustle and Bustle Versus Peace and Quiet
programme.desc: Florida newlyweds can't agree on whether they should go with her dream of a vintage charmer in the heart of St. Petersburg, or his wish for a move-in ready house in the suburbs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Move-in Ready
programme.desc: After trying for years, Jackie and JR have two beautiful girls and are now searching for a home to raise them in. They have settled on a spacious suburban house with an amazing backyard but it will need a complete overhaul to make it work.

programme.title: House Hunters: Car Dad in Carlsbad
programme.desc: A recent divorcee in Carlsbad, CA, looks for a unique home for himself and his extensive car collection. His daughter joins the hunt to help curb his impulsiveness and offer her opinion on the homes' positive and negative energy.

programme.title: House Hunters International: The Dueling Cabos
programme.desc: A couple that's grown weary of Wisconsin winters looks for a second home in Los Cabos, Mexico. He wants to be in the action of Cabo San Lucas while she's convinced sleepy San Jose del Cabo is a better fit, and one of them must compromise.

programme.title: House Hunters: Atlanta Suburbs or Bust!
programme.desc: Young parents want more space to grow their family in Atlanta. She wants to hang on to their youth as long as possible by living in the city, while he wants to relive his childhood with a big house in the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Four's a Crowd in Brazil
programme.desc: A globetrotting family heads to Brazil for dad's job and hopes to be immersed in local culture. With two preteens along on the house hunt, everyone has an opinion and they'll have to come together to make a decision.
